38.reason: This loop stops at the decimal point, so it only prints the integer part after the first digit. It should iterate over all remaining characters, skipping the decimal point, to include the fractional part.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  错误：循环条件 (input[l] != '.') 导致遇到小数点就停止，但小数点后的数字没有被输出。正确做法是跳过小数点，继续输出小数点后的所有数字。
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  This loop stops at the decimal point, so it only prints the integer part after the first digit. It should iterate over all remaining characters, skipping the decimal point, to include the fractional part.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  This loop only prints digits before the decimal point. Scientific notation base must include all digits (excluding leading zeros), so a subsequent loop to print digits after the decimal point is missing. As a result, digits after the decimal are omitted, causing the output to be truncated (e.g., "8.7899e4" instead of "8.78999999999999000999e4").
